name: Nakaab
overview: When Aditi Amre becomes involved in the high-profile death case of actress Vibha Dutta, she discovers the horrible secrets that Vibha has been keeping hidden underneath her public persona. Is it a Murder or a Suicide?

trailers.title: Nakaab | Official Trailer | Esha Gupta | Mallika Sherawat | Gautam Rode | MX Exclusive | MX Player
